behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names main.py, process_file, FileProcessingError, Path, read_text, FileNotFoundError, IOError, Args:/Returns: docstring sections — all the literals tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required properties (use pathlib, add type hints, custom exception) but doesn't provide code to copy.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior and required API elements (Path annotation, read_text usage, specific exceptions) that any correct refactor per instructions would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests import and call process_file, execute subprocess, check signatures via inspect, plus some source inspection for read_text/except.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual uppercase conversion and raising FileProcessingError; a stub returning None would fail test_process_file_returns_uppercase_content.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Uppercase behavior, Path usage, type hints, docstring sections, custom exception, no bare except, read_text, specific exceptions all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings, grouped with a pass-to-pass section comment.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references main.py which is the obvious target; no line-level pointers.
